prompt_en: A disciplined final ending at the Dokdo gate where ordered boarding lines move under pale dawn, green approval lamps blink across salt-stained barriers, and exclusion survives as the cost of stability. salt station, public allocation hall, broadcast equipment, handwritten boarding lists, moral pressure. ordered boarding lines, green approval lamps, salt-stained barriers, dawn sea haze, restrained security presence. Grounded Korean apocalypse cinematic realism.
prompt_ko_context: 질서를 유지한 채 선별을 지속하는 엔딩. 새벽빛과 승인 램프, 남겨진 사람의 그림자가 동시에 필요하다.
camera_notes: Begin on the lines moving cleanly, then reveal the unchosen side of the barrier before the final wide shot.
audio_notes: Dawn wind, speaker announcements, slow low brass, measured footsteps on metal decking.
stitch_prompt: A disciplined final ending at the Dokdo gate where ordered boarding lines move under pale dawn, green approval lamps blink across salt-stained barriers, and exclusion survives as the cost of stability. Match style pack P4.ending.p4_end_ordered_selection.
